[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001011 4
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0111011000 5
5 0100001110 4
6 0001010100 3
7 1011001100 5
